  • Overview

  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AppContext
    Holds shared application objects for JavaFX controllers.
    AppController
    Contract implemented by controllers that receive application-level dependencies after their FXML view is loaded.
    AuthService
    Provides user registration, login, logout, and user-ID availability checks.
    DashboardController
    Controls dashboard navigation, child views, and logout.
    FriendsController
    Controls friend listing, searching, filtering, relationship inspection, and add/remove operations.
    FriendService
    Provides friendship queries and operations for the current session.
    LoginController
    Controls login, network import/export, registration navigation, and application exit.
    Main
    Provides the command-line entry point for the Buongiorno application.
    NetworkFileManager
    Loads and saves social-network data in the application's comma-separated USER and FRIEND record format.
    PasswordUtil
    Hashes and verifies passwords using salted PBKDF2-HMAC-SHA256.
    ProfileController
    Controls display and editing of the current user's profile.
    RecommendationsController
    Controls display and acceptance of scored friend recommendations.
    RecommendationsController.RecommendationRow
    Immutable table-row model containing a recommended user and score.
    RecommendationService
    Generates friend recommendations from the current user's friends-of-friends graph.
    RegisterController
    Controls user registration and navigation back to the login screen.
    Session
    Stores the identity of the user currently authenticated in the application.
    SocialNetwork
    Stores users and undirected friendships, with secondary indexes for workplace and hometown searches.
    SocialNetworkApp
    Creates and connects the model, persistence, and service-layer objects used by the application.
    SocialNetworkFxApp
    JavaFX application responsible for stage setup and screen navigation.
    User
    Represents a social-network user and the identifiers of that user's friends.
    UserService
    Provides profile access and user search operations.
